title: korczewski-ha → korczewski rename + script cleanups
description:
## Summary

Drains uncommitted work that had piled up on the working tree:

- **`korczewski-ha → korczewski`** rename across docs, Taskfile, agents, manifests, scripts and ArgoCD spoke RBAC. The `-ha` suffix is a leftover from when korczewski was the first 3-node HA cluster — since the 2026-05-09 re-split it's just `korczewski` in user-facing config. No cluster, API server or credential change.
- **Drop obsolete `.claude/skills/dev-flow*`** files — superseded by `dev-flow-plan` + `dev-flow-execute` in PR #717.
- **Misc script cleanups** picked up in the same drain:
  - `verify-deployment.sh`: probe `arena-server` on korczewski (it doesn't run on mentolder), drop the now-redundant cross-namespace tracking-import probe.
  - `fix-tickets-grants.mjs`: generalise `reownSuperpowers` → `reownSchemas` (also re-owns `tickets`); tolerate per-object ALTER failures.
  - `check-connectivity.sh`: only inject `--resolve 127.0.0.1` in dev so prod checks hit real DNS.
  - `docs-configmap-apply.sh`: fix broken python heredoc (a previous diff-paste accidentally pasted `...` and dropped the closing `"`).

## Test plan

- [x] `task test:all` — green (caught the docs-configmap-apply.sh syntax break before push)
- [x] `task workspace:validate` — green
- [x] `grep -rn korczewski-ha` — 0 hits
- [ ] Post-merge: no deploy needed (no runtime-image-baked files changed; the prod-korczewski overlay diff is pure rename — ArgoCD will reconcile harmlessly)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
